dialogos.texto_en: ...Uhh, what should I do?
(A hotel room is basically a room for sleeping,\n right? Why is it so big?)
(I can't relax like this! It's too overwhelming!\n I need to do something! \n A smaller room would have been better since I'm alone!)
(There is a desk and a chair, so...should I just study then?\n It's not really made for studying though.)
(Hm? Who is it?)
Yes%p-2;――
Woah, I-Itsuki?
Good evening.
H-hey...\nWhat's going on, all of a sudden?
Um, can I...come into your room?
We can talk right here.
(I think it might not be a good idea to go \n into the room at this hour...)
No, it's just...it's nothing in particular.\nI just wanted to talk with you, Uesugi-kun.
You sure it's nothing more than a chat?
Well, even though I say talk, it's not \nexactly anything important...
(...She wants to spend time with me!)
Alright, but let's at least talk while standing.\nCome on in.
Pardon the intrusion.
We could go to the lounge, if you want to talk?\nYou don't want to be alone with me in my room, right?
(Even though we're dating,\n being alone with me in my room\n at this hour is a bit much.)
Well, I'm glad you're considerate,\nbut I just wanted to talk a little.\nIf it's okay with you, we can talk in your room...
I-I see.\nWell, come on in then.
Okay, thank you very much.
Come on in.
Ah...
Huh? What is it?
W-well, um...\nI'm sorry for suddenly saying something so forward.
Ahhh...\nActually, I guess it is a little much to go\ninto a guy's room at this hour, huh?
But, I...\nI also wanna spend time with you.
Is that so...
Well then, pardon the intrusion.
Yeah.
(I never expected Itsuki to come to my room.\n I didn't anticipate this situation at all!)
(Although, this situation of being alone in my room with her\n is a perfect opportunity to kiss her%p-2;――%p;)
(N-no, I shouldn't be too aggressive!\n The trip has only just begun,\n I need to handle things more carefully!)
By the way, did you tell the others\nthat you were coming to my room?
Yes, I told Ichika about it.\nI think it would've gone fine\nwith Nino and Miku as well.
Everyone approves of our relationship,\nso there's no reason to keep it a secret, right?
...Right.
(I actually have no idea what kind of interaction took place \n between all the sisters until Itsuki responded to \n my confession. They didn't tell me anything.)
(However, I think they each came to an agreement\n that they could accept.)
(Otherwise, we wouldn't have been able\n to go on this graduation trip together.)
Although...\nDespite the fact that we're in a relationship,\nnothing has actually changed for us.
W-well, we were both busy with exams, after all.
And, as students, studying came first. \nWe couldn't afford to get distracted from university prep \njust because we're in a relationship.
I suppose so...
Um, Uesugi-kun. Thank you again for everything.\nI was able to pass thanks to you.
I just did my job as a tutor.\nYou passed because you worked hard.
Even so. Thanks to you, I can now pursue my dream.
Now that I've been accepted to university,\nfrom now on...
...From now on?
From now on... I'm...
What's wrong?
Hey, Itsuki?
Um... Can I stay here a little longer?
Huh?\nThat doesn't really answer my question.\nWas there something you wanted to say?
...It's nothing.
I mean, it doesn't seem like it's nothing%p-2;――
You said it, right?\nThat you want to be with me.
Me too.\nI want to be with you...\nas your significant other...
O-oh... Really?
I-is it wrong...to want to be with you?
I don't...I don't think it's wrong.\nI want to be with you too, Itsuki.
...Oh good. I'm relieved.
(Uh oh.\n As soon as I started thinking of her as my lover,\n I don't know what to say anymore!)
Th-the weather was nice today, wasn't it?\nI hope it stays sunny tomorrow.
It should be fine.\nThe weather forecast said it'll be clear for a while.
I see.
S-speaking of which, about today's dinner.\nAs expected, the seafood was beyond delicious!
Y-yes.\nI was surprised by how fresh the sashimi was.
(What do lovers usually talk about\n in moments like this?!\n I have no idea!!)
Ah...\nIt's about time I head back,\nisn't it? It's getting late.
Y-yeah.\nBe careful going back.
I'm just walking around the hotel,\nso there's nothing to worry about.
That's true.\nHahaha...
But, thanks a lot.\nGood night, Uesugi-kun.
Yeah, good night.
*sigh*
(What does it mean to act like a lover?\n I have no experience, so I have no idea!)
Well...there's no point in worrying about it.
(It didn't go smoothly, but I confirmed that Itsuki\n wants to spend time with me as a lover.\n That's progress.)
(The trip has just begun.\n Tomorrow is when things really start!)
